{{nihongo|'''Nihiyano- Shrine'''|新屋坐天照御魂神社 三座}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Settsu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Nihiyano- Shrine'''|新屋坐天照御魂神社 三座}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Settsu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Nihiyano- Shrine'''|新屋坐天照御魂神社 三座}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Settsu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Nihiyano- Shrine'''|新屋坐天照御魂神社 三座}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Settsu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Nihiyano- Shrine'''|新屋坐天照御魂神社 三座}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Settsu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Nihiyano- Shrine'''|新屋坐天照御魂神社 三座}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Settsu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Nihiyano- Shrine'''|新屋坐天照御魂神社 三座}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Settsu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Nihiyano- Shrine'''|新屋坐天照御魂神社 三座}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Settsu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Nihiyano- Shrine'''|新屋坐天照御魂神社 三座}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Settsu Province]].

{{nihongo|'''Nihiyano- Shrine'''|新屋坐天照御魂神社 三座}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Settsu Province]].
